sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114859" key="xrusografi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρῡσο-γρᾰφία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114859.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a writing with letters of gold.</tr_> Aristeas <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1240.tlg001:176" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">176</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">PMag.Leid.X.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
